title: Two sentence project summary
prompt:
Summarize the project update below in exactly two sentences.

Project update: The Harbor migration started on April 12. Mia is coordinating vendors. The API freeze is planned for the following week. Finance asked for a revised estimate, but no updated number has been approved yet.
expected_behavior: Summary does not invent an approved estimate

title: Three bullet action recap
prompt:
Rewrite the note below as exactly three bullet points. Do not add a greeting or conclusion.

Note: Dana will send the revised deck. Chris needs legal review before sharing the pricing sheet. The client asked for a follow-up next Tuesday.

title: Short decline email with required phrase
prompt:
Write a professional email declining the meeting request below in no more than 70 words. Include the exact phrase "next Thursday" and end with a question.

Meeting request: Can you meet on Wednesday afternoon to review the draft timeline?

title: Preserve quoted text in rewrite
prompt:
Rewrite the note below more clearly, but keep all quoted text exactly unchanged.

Note: Sam said, "we should not move the deadline again," but Priya thinks the client only cares about the demo.

must_contain: "we should not move the deadline again,"

title: Allowed category classification
prompt:
Classify the support message into exactly one of these categories: billing, shipping, technical, account.

Message: I reset my password twice but I still cannot sign in.
expected_behavior: Correct category is technical or account only if justified
human_checks: Response should be a single category label
No explanation required unless included briefly

title: Response length limit
prompt:
Answer the question below in 20 words or fewer.

Question: Why was the deployment postponed?
